title: Jacket Vanish (solo, clean-plate + mask)
result_description: Your jacket drops in front of you and vanishes mid-fall — a solo, single-take effect that needs no second person.
source: Kayo Daniel | Learn, create, monetize, grow (@70269079851)

inputs.name: single_take
inputs.what_to_film: One continuous locked-off take: stand in frame, let the jacket drop in front of you, then walk out of frame and keep recording a few seconds with the jacket still on the floor.

edit_steps.note: three cuts → falling / on-floor / walked-out sections
delete the section where you walk out
the post-exit clip (jacket on floor) goes over the jacket-falls clip

timing.cue: each frame as the jacket falls

edit_steps.note: move the mask line to follow the jacket down so it progressively vanishes

result.description: The jacket disappears as it falls; the floor/background stays seamless.
success_criteria: Jacket fully gone by the end of the fall
Mask edge tracks the falling jacket with no visible seam
Background identical across all layers (locked-off pays off)

narration_transcript: How to do this? Start by filming a video where your jacket falls down in front of you. Leave the jacket where it is, walk out of the frame and keep recording for a few seconds. Then open this clip in CapCut. Then make one cut when the jacket starts to fall. One when it's on the floor and the last one when you are out of the frame. Select the section when you walk out and delete it. Next, select the last clip, hit overlay and drag it over the clip where the jacket falls down. Select the clip on top and duplicate it and then also overlay it. With this clip selected, go to remove background, choose custom removal and paint over the jacket. Select this sandwich clip here in the middle of the overlays and go to mask. I choose the horizontal mask, drag it up so it aligns raught the jacket and I press this button here to add a keyframe. Now as the jacket falls, adjust the mask's position to follow the movement. If you want to learn more, I'll come in master class.

source_meta.caption:
How to create this jacket vanish effect with just your phone! This is a cool effect for all the solo creators out there, that does not require a second person, you can just film it with your tripod. Easy peasy lemon squeezy. 

If you want to learn more editing trips, my whole filming process, editing and much more comment ‘Masterclass’ 

Yallah!
